title: Acacia Wood Serving Platter 43 x 15cm with Grooves & Handle XL Luxury Snack Paddle Large XL Reversible Tray for Dinner Parties Ideal for Chips Dips Crudités Cheese Charcuterie Deluxe Present Gift UK
features: ✔ LA MONGOOSE ACACIA WOOD CHEESE AND SNACK PLATTER: Give this beautifully designed platter to someone you love, for their birthday, Christmas, housewarming gathering, wedding, engagement party, baby shower, wine and cheese tastings, and many other events. Impress your guests at your next social gathering with the elegant wood grain finish and rich dark brown colour of this beautiful snack paddle.

✔ MULTIFUNCTIONAL, LUXURY PRODUCT: A modern design for your modern kitchen. Use this attractive platter for serving a selection of appetizers and hors d'oeuvres at your next dinner party. Whether you prefer nachos and guacamole, grapes, nuts and cheese, or healthy crudités, you will be able to elevate your enjoyment with this attractive product.

✔ SNACK PLATTER FEATURES: A 17 x 6 x 1” inch board with a selection of grooves for your favourite foods. These are perfect for sorting your snack selection into different categories. The La Mongoose snack platter also features a useful hole in the handle so you can hang it up when not in use.

✔ SUPERIOR QUALITY, LOVINGLY CRAFTED, HYGIENIC AND ECO-FRIENDLY: Made from ethically sourced, sustainable and robust Acacia wood, the La Mongoose snack platter will last a lifetime when treated properly. Acacia is extremely durable and by rubbing a little mineral oil into the natural wood surface on a regular basis, your product will look like new for years to come. Our Acacia is also BPA-Free, which means your dining experience won’t be ruined by odours, colours or nasty chemicals.

✔ 1 YEAR GUARANTEE: At La Mongoose, our customers come first. We create our products with your satisfaction in mind, and therefore we are confident that every unique La Mongoose kitchen item will surpass your expectations. Don’t delay, order one today!
description: LA MONGOOSE ACACIA WOOD CHEESE AND CHARCUTERIE SNACK PLATTER - Makes serving and eating snacks the enjoyable experience it should be. Made from the finest, quality, natural, sustainable premium, organic, eco-friendly acacia wood . Features a selection of grooves, useful for presenting a range of different snack options. Makes a fantastic gift and a stunning centrepiece at your next gathering. Treated with natural food oils to remain safe to use, this platter is hygienic and clean , whether your food is warm or cold. Consistent durability for a lifetime of use, will not crack or warp like cheaper products. Use this as a sophisticated serving tray at your next dinner party or social gathering. From hors d'oeuvres, nachos and guacamole, hummus and crudités, to charcuterie, fruit, cold meats, bread sticks and cheeses… whatever you want! This platter is multi-functional , has all the space you could ever need, and brings sophistication to your dining table or dinner party. Makes an exceptional gift for a wedding, birthday, hostess or housewarming party, or simply something to keep for yourself. Modern and sophisticated , our snack paddle will give your kitchen and dining room an elegant touch. The platter is 17 inches long, 6 inches wide, and has a 3 inch long handle with a helpful hole to allow you to hang it up when not in use. The main groove in the middle (ideal for dips) measures 6 inches across – that's room for enough salsa and guac/ for everyone! Please note: do not put in the dishwasher; we only recommend cleaning by hand as it's made from natural wood. As with all La Mongoose products, sourcing environmentally friendly materials is very important to us. This product comes in superior, eco-friendly packaging - good for your kitchen, good for the environment! La Mongoose - Adore la Vie de Paris
